instruction:
Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: bioluminescent deep sea.

Patch:
- remove sv_022-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_022-path-002.stroke: "#f97316" -> "#ffd6f2"
- download-sv_022-circle-001.cx: 243.0 -> 200
- download-sv_022-path-001.stroke-width: 8.0 -> 3
- download-sv_022-polygon-002.opacity: 0.32 -> 0.7
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1600 1000">

    <linearGradient id="ray02" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#8fe3ff" stop-opacity="0.5" />
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#8fe3ff" stop-opacity="0" />
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="jelly02" cx="0.5" cy="0.4" r="0.6">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#ff8fd0" />

      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#1a7a8a" stop-opacity="0.1" />
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="glow02" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#bfffe0" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#bfffe0" stop-opacity="0" />
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="cone02" cx="0.5" cy="0" r="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#d8f6ff" stop-opacity="0.55" />
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#d8f6ff" stop-opacity="0" />
    </radialGradient>
    <filter id="blur02" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="6" /></filter>
    <filter id="blurbig02" x="-80%" y="-80%" width="260%" height="260%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="16" /></filter>
  </defs>
